{{Infobox artifact
| name = Razor
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Razor is a versatile and powerful weapon wielded by [[Suriel]]. It can manifest as a meter-long rectangular shaft of blue metal or expand into an elaborate, multi-pronged form resembling a tree made of sharp light or shining blades. The weapon possesses several advanced functions, including the ability to dissolve objects like armored wagons and respond to specific signals or beacons. [[Suriel]] uses the Razor for combat, such as intercepting bullets and striking enemies from a distance, but it also serves a profound restorative purpose. When used with intense concentration, the Razor can perform complex healing and restoration tasks, such as repairing an entire [[Iteration]]. Additionally, it functions as a tool for separation, capable of cutting through the very existence of targets deemed to be blights on reality.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Suriel's Razor]] is a meter-long rectangular shaft of blue metal with many functions.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Suriel]] possesses a weapon called the [[Razor]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Razor]] is a weapon made of sapphire [[steel]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1">''Underlord'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Suriel's Razor]] is a multi-pronged weapon of shining blades that can bloom from a two-meter bar of blue [[steel]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Suriel]] uses the power of the [[Razor]] to catch the wave of chaos-fire.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Razor]] is a weapon used by [[Suriel]] for healing.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Suriel's Razor]] can split into many branches.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
